'''Corellian Masternav, Incorporation''' was a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] based company that was renowned for producing highly accurate astrogation maps. They used droidships to conduct survey missions.

App. 1 year after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] a Corellian Meatlump gang started firing warning shots at Masternav's astrogation surveyor ships, followed by extortion attempts, demanding payments to "protect" Masternav's ships. In the absence of adequate police involvement, Masternav commissioned an independent agent to destroy the gangster base and protect their business.

{{Company-stub}}
